title: Strength Climb
description: Push-ups and squats pyramid followed by a classic targeting core and hinge for progressive full body

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Incline push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands on a raised surface, easier

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower thighs parallel to the floor

exercises.name: Good morning
exercises.instructions: Hands behind the head, lean torso forward keeping the back straight

exercises.name: Forearm plank
exercises.instructions: On forearms, body perfectly aligned, brace the abs

exercises.name: Toe touches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs vertical, reach hands to feet

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
